student_input: I got 1010/1100 in Matric, 970/1100 in FSc and 185 in MDCAT. I want to apply to King Edward Medical University.

state.advice: Congratulations on achieving a merit score of 90.7%! Given your eligibility status is true, ensure you meet all other admission requirements and submit your application promptly to secure your spot. Stay confident and prepare for the next steps in the admission process.
